issue_classifications.title: [Draft][Workspace]: Reassess lifecycle tools as generated-adapter-safe orchestration primitives
issue_classifications.evidence: lifecycle_generation_readiness.json records phase map, risk/effect matrix, primitive/output review, fixture plan, and generation decisions before lifecycle adapter generation.

issue_classifications.title: [Draft][Workspace]: Map lifecycle command tasks and phases before generation
issue_classifications.evidence: The readiness contract maps shared phases across root lifecycle commands plus planning and memory status surfaces.

issue_classifications.title: [Draft][Workspace]: Define lifecycle risk and effect matrix
issue_classifications.evidence: Each command entry carries read/write, repo-write, destructive, idempotency, preflight, local-only, branch-sensitive, review, and generation-eligibility fields.

issue_classifications.title: [Draft][Workspace]: Review lifecycle primitives and output contracts
issue_classifications.evidence: The readiness contract records primitive responsibilities, output contract expectations, and the lifecycle.verify gap before mutating lifecycle generation.

issue_classifications.title: [Draft][Workspace]: Plan lifecycle conformance fixtures before adapter generation
issue_classifications.evidence: The readiness contract records first fixture scenarios for dry-run, status, upgrade dry-run, uninstall refusal, local-only preservation, and strict preflight.

findings.title: [Draft][Workspace]: Reassess lifecycle tools as generated-adapter-safe orchestration primitives
findings.evidence: lifecycle_generation_readiness.json records phase map, risk/effect matrix, primitive/output review, fixture plan, and generation decisions before lifecycle adapter generation.
findings.notes: No lifecycle adapter was generated; mutation and destructive lifecycle surfaces remain deferred.

findings.title: [Draft][Workspace]: Map lifecycle command tasks and phases before generation
findings.evidence: The readiness contract maps shared phases across root lifecycle commands plus planning and memory status surfaces.
findings.notes: Adapter-owned phases and runtime-owned phases are separated per command.

findings.title: [Draft][Workspace]: Define lifecycle risk and effect matrix
findings.evidence: Each command entry carries read/write, repo-write, destructive, idempotency, preflight, local-only, branch-sensitive, review, and generation-eligibility fields.
findings.notes: Semantic checks reject mutating commands marked eligible-read-only and destructive commands not deferred-destructive.

findings.title: [Draft][Workspace]: Review lifecycle primitives and output contracts
findings.evidence: The readiness contract records primitive responsibilities, output contract expectations, and the lifecycle.verify gap before mutating lifecycle generation.
findings.notes: Runtime primitives continue to own planning, mutation, verification, and local inspection.

findings.title: [Draft][Workspace]: Plan lifecycle conformance fixtures before adapter generation
findings.evidence: The readiness contract records first fixture scenarios for dry-run, status, upgrade dry-run, uninstall refusal, local-only preservation, and strict preflight.
findings.notes: Fixture implementation remains out of scope for the draft planning slice.
